zh.lifeSummary: 當Millicent Mering於1409年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可圖登哈姆時，她的父親William Mainwaring19歲，母親Elizabeth de Leycaster20歲。她於大約1435年與William Thomas De Staunton在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾塞頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年之前在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可圖登哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Millicent Mering于1409年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可圖登哈姆时，她的父亲William Mainwaring19岁，母亲Elizabeth de Leycaster20岁。她于大约1435年与William Thomas De Staunton在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾塞頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1500年之前在她的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可圖登哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Mering
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hasso, Alfons, Alois, Arno, Ernst, Erwin, Florian, Gerhard, Guenther, Kurt, Ludwig, Manfred.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German hærinc ‘herring’, German Hering, a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, particularly a seller of herrings, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a herring. In some cases the Jewish surname is artificial. In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the German and Jewish variant Häring. Compare Haring .

German and Dutch: habitational name from any of several places and farmhouses so named, for instance near Zeesse in Overijssel, originally inhabited by a certain Here or Hero and his kin. Here or Hero is a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name with the element heri ‘army’.

variants.name: Haring
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (mainly Häring); Dutch: from Middle Low German hārinc ‘herring’, German Hering, a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, particularly a seller of herringss, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a herring. In some cases the Jewish surname is artificial. Compare Haering and Hering .
Austrian German: nickname for a skinny person (like a herring; see 1 above).
German (Häring): habitational name from Häring (Bavaria, Tyrol) or Häringen (Baden-Württemberg).

variants.name: Herring
meanings: English (London), Dutch, and German: metonymic occupational name for a herring fisher or for a seller of the fish, or perhaps for someone who habitually ate herring, from Middle English hering (Old English hǣring, hēring), Dutch haring, Middle High German hærinc. In some cases it may have been a nickname in the sense of a trifle, something of little value, a meaning which is found in medieval phrases and proverbial expressions such as ‘to like neither herring nor barrel’, i.e. not to like something at all.
German: habitational name from Herringen in Westphalia.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Hering  .

variants.name: Heuring
meanings: German: variant of Höring, probably a vowel variant of Hering .

variants.name: Hoerig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt.

German (Hörig): nickname from Middle High German hœrec ‘obedient, in bondage’, Middle Low German horich ‘obedient, belonging to’. In some cases from Middle Low German horink ‘child born out of wedlock’.

nameMeanings.name: Millicent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Melisende, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from amal ‘labour’ + swinth ‘strength’. This was the name of a daughter of Charlemagne. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Millicent Mering was born in 1409, in Tuddenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Mainwaring, was 19 and her mother, Elizabeth de Leycaster, was 20. She married William Thomas De Staunton about 1435, in Sutton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died before 1500, in her hometown, and was buried in Tuddenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Millicent Mering est née en 1409, à Tuddenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Mainwaring, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Leycaster, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Thomas De Staunton environ 1435, à Sutton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1500, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Tuddenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Millicent Mering 1409 in Tuddenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Mainwaring 19 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Leycaster 20. Sie hat um 1435 in Sutton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom William Thomas De Staunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1500 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Tuddenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato William Thomas De Staunton circa 1435, nel Sutton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Millicent Meringが1409年にイギリスイギリススフォルクトゥッドエンハムで生まれた時，父William Mainwaringは19歳，母Elizabeth de Leycasterは20歳であった。約1435年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスットオンでWilliam Thomas De Stauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1500年以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクトゥッドエンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Millicent Mering(이)가 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 투데함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Mainwaring(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Leycaster(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 수턴에서 William Thomas De Staunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 투데함에 묻혔다.

pt.Of Staunton-Harold,Lcstrs,,, England: Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Millicent Mering nasceu em 1409, em Tuddenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Mainwaring, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Leycaster, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William Thomas De Staunton aproximadamente 1435, em Sutton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1500, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Tuddenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Of Staunton-Harold,Lcstrs,,, England: Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Millicent Mering родилась в 1409 г. в местности тудденам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Mainwaring было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Leycaster, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Thomas De Staunton около 1435 г. в местности суттон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла перед 1500 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности тудденам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con William Thomas De Staunton aproximadamente 1435, en Sutton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 1500, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Tuddenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
